raw_consumer_statement:
I am filing this complaint regarding Citibanks handling of a disputed credit card transaction that I did not authorize. 

The unauthorized charge of {$910.00} posted to my credit card account on XX/XX/XXXX. 

For clarity, the timeline is as follows : XX/XX/XXXX Fraudulent charge detected and reported to Citibank immediately. 
XX/XX/XXXX Airline notified that the booking was unauthorized. 
XX/XX/XXXX Scheduled departure date of the ticket. 
XX/XX/XXXX Cancellation email received from XXXX, after the departure date. 


I reported the transaction to Citibank as unauthorized. During a phone conversation, Customer Service Supervisor XXXX XXXX informed me that the dispute could not be processed as fraud and would not be refunded because the booking was made by my ex-wife and because I know the individual who used the card. 

I requested a written explanation of this decision, including the specific policy, investigation findings, or legal basis used to deny my claim. I also requested documentation supporting the determination that the transaction was authorized. 

Despite my request, I have not received any written explanation. 

I am concerned that Citibanks position suggests that if a cardholder knows the individual who used the card, the transaction can not be considered unauthorized. I did not provide authorization for this transaction. Knowing an individual does not constitute authorization under federal consumer protection laws governing unauthorized credit card use. 

To resolve this matter, I am requesting the following : A written explanation of the investigation conducted regarding this disputed transaction. 

The specific policy or legal basis Citibank relied upon to deny the dispute. 

Documentation supporting Citibanks claim that the transaction was authorized. 

Clarification of Citibanks standards and procedures for determining unauthorized credit card use. 

As the primary cardholder, I expect my account to be protected from unauthorized use and for disputes to be investigated and documented in accordance with applicable consumer protection laws. 

I am requesting a formal written response and appropriate resolution of this dispute. 

* Supporting documents/attachments include the divorce decree and email communication with the bank, for which I did not receive any reply or explanation.
